MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-01-2011 IN 206, DEFENDANTS JOHN RYAN AND JASON RIGGS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS HELD. THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION SINGLY ASSIGNED THE CASE TO ONE JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/7/11 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 AND THE MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF 2/18/11 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 604 WAS VACATED. NOTICE OF THE SINGLE ASSIGNMENT AND A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE DATE WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER OF TODAY'S RULING. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
